narrative:
Seven Hills-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,084 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
